ModMetaData.name: Auto-Deathrest
ModMetaData.author: Oliver Probst
ModMetaData.description:
Sanguophages (and other pawns carrying the Deathrest gene) automatically enter deathrest once their remaining need drops below a configurable threshold — analogous to vanilla hemogen auto-consume.
Fully configurable through the mod settings: - Trigger threshold in percent (default: 25%) - Always trigger on deathrest exhaustion hediff (default: on) - Only use assigned bed / deathrest casket (default: off) - Show a letter in the top-right when auto-deathrest starts (default: on)
Assigned deathrest caskets take priority over normal beds. Falls back to any suitable humanlike bed that RimWorld's RestUtility considers valid.
Requires the Biotech DLC.
Replacement for "Slurmpy's Auto-Deathrest Mod" (supported only up to 1.4). Reimplemented from scratch for RimWorld 1.6.
---
Source: https://github.com/oprobst/RimworldAutoDeathRest Feel free to fork and adapt — this mod is released as-is and is not actively supported.
